description.content: Search operations across the catalog

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Search Data Catalog

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Search Data Catalog

description.content: Searches Data Catalog for multiple resources like entries and tags that match a query.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations for managing catalog entries

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog List entries

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog List entries

description.content: Lists entries in an entry group.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create an entry

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create an entry

description.content: Creates an entry in the specified entry group.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Get an entry

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Get an entry

description.content: Gets an entry by its resource name.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Update an entry

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Update an entry

description.content: Updates an existing entry.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Delete an entry

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Delete an entry

description.content: Deletes an existing entry.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations for managing entry groups

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog List entry groups

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog List entry groups

description.content: Lists entry groups in the specified project and location.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create an entry group

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create an entry group

description.content: Creates an entry group in the specified project and location.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations for managing tag templates

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create a tag template

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Create a tag template

description.content: Creates a tag template for attaching metadata to data resources.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Get a tag template

request.name: Google Cloud Data Catalog Get a tag template

description.content: Gets a tag template by its resource name.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The Data Catalog API provides a unified view of all data assets and enables metadata management, data discovery, and data governance across an organization. It allows programmatic creation and management of entries, tag templates, and policy tags.
